name: cron
description: In-app self-hosted scheduler for Encore CronJobs (self-hosted deploys, where Encore's CronJob primitive is a no-op). Stores schedules in the base app's SQLDatabase("app") (INV-11, no per-service db) and fires due jobs against the app's own endpoints from a polling daemon. Lock backend: Postgres atomic claim by default (small scale); Redis when REDIS_URL is set (large scale). Requires data-postgres; optionally peers with data-redis for the large-scale distributed lock. Companion to OAP spec 230.

migrations.description: task_schedules store for the in-app cron scheduler (id, endpoint, schedule, next_run_at, last_run_at), added to the base app database

SCHEDULER_BASE_URL.description: Base URL the daemon fires job endpoints against (default http://127.0.0.1:4000, the same-process gateway for a single-container self-hosted deploy; override for multi-container topologies)

REDIS_URL.description: When set (large scale), the scheduler uses a Redis distributed lock instead of the Postgres atomic claim
